ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The First Interim Accounting
Off Calendar Dec-14-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The First Interim Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-30-2021 Continued To Dec-14-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lisa Kohli, via ZOOM, for Monica McKenzie, Administrator.

Ms. Kohli reports that an Accounting Petition has been prepared and submitted for e-filing, which is confirmed by the court.

The Status on Filing First Interim Accounting is continued to Dec-14-2021at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The First Interim Accounting
Off Calendar Oct-26-2021 Continued To Nov-30-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Chritopher DeWys, via ZOOM, for Monica McKenzie, Administrator.
The court requests a status of the accounting. Counsel reports that an accounting had been submitted to him earlier this month, but that he found it to be insufficient and the accountant advised him that they could not finalize it. Accordingly, counsel is searching for a new accountant to assist him.

After additional discussion, the Status of Filing of First Interim Accounting is continued to Nov-30-2021 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Mary Wiss. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The First Interim Accounting
Off Calendar Sep-21-2021 Continued To Oct-26-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Christopher Dewys appeared by zoom for Monica McKenzie.

The Court questions why an accounting is not filed. Mr. Dewys stated that his client apologizes to the court, that he was told the accounting is expected to be done by the end of the month, and that he was under the idea that all of the beneficiaries were going to waive an accounting, but one beneficiary will not waive. Mr. Dewys also stated that the accountant was retained in August, that it is his understanding that the accountant has all of the information that is needed, and that he plans to file a petition for final distribution shortly after. Status on filing of the first interim accounting is continued to October 26, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
